name: Sanity
description: Query content, manage schemas, run GROQ queries, and deploy studio changes
longDescription: Official Sanity MCP server for interacting with Sanity CMS. Execute GROQ queries, explore schemas, manage documents, create and update content, deploy schema changes, and manage projects/datasets/API keys. Supports both OAuth and API token authentication.
author: Sanity

apiKeyConfig.label: Sanity API Token
apiKeyConfig.helperText: Create an API token at sanity.io/manage with appropriate permissions

examplePrompts: Run a GROQ query to find all published posts
Get the schema for the article document type
Create a new blog post with title and content
List all datasets in my project
Get the API keys for my project
